title: Carrom games/ manifest
$comment: Validates ONE manifest.json under res://games/ in isolation. The runtime loader (scripts/ui/menu/FlavourLoader.cs) walks the tree and cascades manifest fields + asset lookups leaf -> ancestors -> engine defaults; that cascade is NOT visible to the schema. The same schema covers three node shapes: (1) engine root games/manifest.json (sparse, no rule_set, no UI), (2) group nodes (title/tagline/accent only — clicking descends into games/<id>/), (3) leaf nodes (carry rule_set: 'icf' | 'casual' | 'arcade'; arcade leaves carry the full FlavourManifest shape). A FOURTH shape — per-mini-game configs inside an arcade flavour (games/<flavour>/games/<sub>/manifest.json) — uses type: 'rotor' + rotor params (ring_count, segment_count, payout_patterns, ...). All four shapes overlap; every field below is optional so a sparse manifest validates. The runtime decides which fields it actually consumes based on rule_set / type. Mini-games are NOT listed in a `mechanics` array: the loader auto-discovers them by walking child folders, so the schema does not declare that field.

id.description: Stable identifier. Must equal the folder name for arcade leaves. Defaults to the folder name when omitted.

title.description: Display name on the carousel / picker.

accent.description: Brand colour driving badges, hover glows, indicator chips.

poster.description: Optional carousel-card path. Convention default: poster.png at the node root, falling back to posters/main.png.

card_color.description: Row-1 carousel card gradient base colour. Absent → the accent. Read by FlavourLoader -> Node.CardColor (casino uses this).

card_texture.description: Row-1 carousel card background texture path. Absent → the accent gradient. Read by FlavourLoader -> Node.CardTexturePath (purist uses this).

rule_set.description: Required on a playable LEAF. icf/casual -> built by RulesFlavour; arcade -> built by JsonFlavour (full FlavourManifest). Absent on group nodes (descend-into-children instead of play).

rules.description: Per-flag deltas relative to the rule_set preset (scripts/game/RuleFlags.cs). Every field nullable; missing keys inherit the preset.

no_contact_policy.description: Case-insensitive at runtime; canonical lowercase here.

queen_is_standard_coin.description: True (arcade): queen has no cover requirement, no early-queen return, no special turn-flow side effects.

coin_off_board_is_foul.description: True (ICF): a non-striker coin jumping off the board is a foul — returned to centre AND the shooter loses one own coin (or owes a due) and the turn passes. False (Casual/Arcade): the coin just returns, no penalty.

board_size.description: BoardSizeRegistry id. Defaults to 'icf' for rules leaves; arcade leaves default to whatever BoardSize resolves to.

leaderboard_id.description: Steam leaderboard partition id. Defaults to the flavour id.

completionist_achievement.description: Arcade only — Steam achievement awarded when every sub-game has been played.

currency.description: Chip/token economy currency id (e.g. 'tokens'). Presence enables the wealth display + wager economy; null = pure carrom, no economy.

surface_material.description: icf/casual leaves — PbrTextureSetRegistry id for the playing surface.

surface_tint.description: Optional #RRGGBB multiply over the playing-surface albedo (e.g. tint an ivory/felt set navy for a slate look). Absent — the wood set's own tone.

frame_material.description: icf/casual leaves — PbrTextureSetRegistry id for the frame border.

leg_material.description: PbrTextureSetRegistry id for the table legs. Defaults to the table/frame material.

table_material.description: PbrTextureSetRegistry id for the supporting wood table slab under the board.

surface_roughness_scale.description: Multiplier on the playing-surface roughness. Default 1.0.

corner_albedo_scale.description: Albedo multiplier on the rounded frame corner band so it tone-matches the straight rails. Default 0.82 (mahogany); a uniform dark frame wants ~1.0. Flavour.CornerAlbedoScale.

corner_cutoff_mm.description: Distance in mm along the mitre diagonal to the corner cut line. Default 20. Drives FrameBuilder's corner geometry.

corner_round_inner.description: Round (fillet) the inner edge of the frame corner. Default true.

corner_round_outer.description: Round (fillet) the outer edge of the frame corner. Default true.

outer_bullnose.description: Bullnose the frame's outer face. Default true (off when a surround abuts the outer face). FrameOuterBullnose.

reflection_probe.description: Per-game graphics toggle: local box-projected reflection probe (sharp metal reflections). Absent → follows arcade-overlay (purist flavours use the soft sky IBL). IFlavour.WantsReflectionProbe.

ambient_dust.description: Per-game graphics toggle: drifting atmosphere dust motes over the table. Default true (also needs Medium+ graphics + a backdrop). IFlavour.WantsAmbientDust.

surface_roughness.description: Playing-surface roughness (lower = glossier, 1.0 = fully matte / no shine). Default 0.30. Flavour.SurfaceRoughness.

surface_uv_repeats.description: Surface texture UV repeat count, overriding the ~8cm wood-grain auto-tiling. Few large repeats = one stone/marble slab; 0/unset = auto. Flavour.SurfaceUvRepeats.

grain_anisotropy.description: Anisotropic stretch of the surface grain reflections. Default 0.90. Fed to the surface shader's grain_anisotropy.

surface_ao_strength.description: Ambient-occlusion strength for the surface micro-structure. Default 1.0. Scales the AO applied by PlayingSurfaceBuilder.

frame_finish.description: Frame lacquer finish. 'piano_gloss' = mirror clearcoat, 'matte'/'painted' = no sheen, 'satin'/'gloss' = default soft clearcoat. Default satin.

frame_grain_rotate.description: Rotate the frame wood grain 90°. Set true when the frame_material texture's grain runs along its V (short) axis instead of U, so the grain reads lengthwise on the rails. Default false.

corner_style.description: Frame corner treatment, e.g. 'round_corners' for filleted+bullnosed corners. Default mitred square.

corner_cap_mesh.description: Shared corner-cap GLB in the engine root library res://assets/meshes/ (e.g. 'half_corner_cap.glb' / 'full_corner_cap.glb'); geometry only, surfaced via corner_cap_material. Absent → the flavour's own assets/meshes/corner_cap.glb.

corner_cap_material.description: Texture-set id (e.g. 'leather', 'brass') applied to the corner cap as a triplanar PBR material at runtime. Absent → the cap keeps its own baked material.

corner_cap_material_scale.description: Triplanar tiling scale for the corner-cap material (smaller = bigger grain). Default 0.3.

corner_cap_material_normal.description: Normal-map strength for the corner-cap material (punch the leather pores / brass brushing). Default 1.0.

environment.description: LightingPreset / environment id (e.g. 'cafe'). Drives lights + sky + table furniture.

reflection_floor.description: Hex colour: warm minimum applied to the backdrop REFLECTION only (so polished metal reads gold in a dark room). Absent = off (black).

coin_profile.description: CoinBuilderRegistry id for the coin body geometry: 'wood' (default, ICF/Casual) or 'deluxe' (casino chip).

backdrop.description: Optional gameplay panorama path override. Convention default (all leaves): assets/images/backdrop.{jpg,png} at the node root.

turn_marker.description: Current-player marker tuning. All fields optional.

glb.description: Marker mesh override. Convention default: assets/meshes/turn_marker.glb (else the rupee coin).

scale.description: Size multiplier on top of the auto-fit. Default 1.0.

offset_h.description: mm outward(+)/inward(-) along the board radial. Default 0.

offset_y.description: mm up(+)/down(-) on the frame. Default 0.

rotation.description: Degrees about Y, on top of facing the board centre. Default 0.

grunge.description: Unified grunge. coins/frame = procedural finishes (no map covers coins or the frame). board/table = grunge-map channels driving surface_grime.png / table_grime.png: per-channel intensity multipliers (R=patina G=grime B=powder A=wear, default 1.0) + the patina tint range, lerped patina_min_color→patina_max_color by the map's R amount. Default block lives in the root manifest; ICF overrides board/table to zero (pristine).

table_height.description: Table-leg length in mm (= table height). Default 1100. The legs are this tall below the board.

table_drop.description: Lower the table onto the backdrop's painted floor by this many mm (POSITIVE = table lower). Drops the whole rig + camera together; the finite-parallax backdrop floor shifts up to meet the table (needs Medium+ graphics for the parallax). Default 0.

sfx.description: Optional per-event SFX overrides. Convention default: assets/audio/sfx/<event>.{mp3,ogg,wav}, auto-discovered across the node cascade (group->game). Engine ships universal carrom SFX (coin_click, flick, pocketed); declare an entry here only to point at a non-canonical file.

board_decorator.description: BoardDecoratorRegistry id (extra props painted after wood/markings/pockets).

steps.description: Walkthrough step ids looked up in TutorialStepCatalog.

type.description: Sub-game mechanic id (MechanicRegistry). Currently only 'rotor'. Present in games/<flavour>/games/<sub>/manifest.json.

icons_dir.description: Game-folder-relative icon folder (e.g. 'assets/images/'). Loader prefixes 'games/<id>/' before the cascade resolver.

stroke_texture.description: Flavour-root-relative or absolute res:// path. Shared across sub-games via the asset cascade.

arrow_image.description: Printed pointer artwork (textured quad). Missing -> procedural brass triangle.

hub_image.description: Square PNG used as the hub face texture. The circular hub mesh clips it automatically.

outer_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the outer ring (wedge backgrounds + icons + dividers baked together).

mid_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the middle ring (3-ring rotors only — ring_count >= 3).

inner_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the innermost ring (ring_count >= 2).

well_glass.description: Well glass-cap override: 'smoked' / 'none'. Empty/absent → derived from presentation. Decouples the glass cover from presentation mode.

arrow_image_scale.description: Quad side length in hub-radius units. Default 1.6. Only consumed when arrow_image is set.

arrow_image_z_offset_frac.description: +Z shift in hub-radius units to line a PNG's painted hub-ring up with the engine hub. Default 0.

arrow_image_below_disc.description: When true, draw the arrow under the wedge face so the disc hides most of the hub-graphic and only the pointer finger sticks out. Default false.

outer_image_rotation_rad.description: Static rotation applied to outer_image so a manifest-supplied PNG can be aligned with the engine's wedge boundaries without re-exporting. Default 0.

well_radius_fraction.description: Desired well outer radius as a fraction of half the board's outer-circle diameter. Missing -> engine default = centre-rose marking size (encloses the starting coin pack). Casino uses 1.665 (the rotor IS the table).

wild.description: Segment id treated as a wild substitute by tally patterns. Field name MUST be 'wild' (not 'wild_icon'; the path resolver mangles *_icon as an asset path).

payout_patterns.description: Ordered scoring chain. Resolver walks entries; first non-zero (or -1 = push) wins, else default_award. Award semantics: >0 = win multiplier (stake * (1 + award)), -1 = push (refund), 0 / missing = no match -> next pattern.

mechanic_defaults.description: Arcade flavour-root block (e.g. games/casino/manifest.json) whose keys are inherited by every child sub-game manifest under games/. Child manifests override per-key. Same key shape as a sub-game's rotor params; commonly lifts type/presentation/icon_passthrough_color/bake_icons_into_wedge.

mechanic.description: Top-level mechanic block authored on a casual/icf LEAF (NOT on an arcade leaf — arcade leaves auto-discover mechanics from games/<sub>/manifest.json). Same shape as a sub-game manifest's rotor params. Lets a non-arcade flavour (e.g. funfair) declare a rotor on the centre rose without inheriting the arcade overlay / orbit / surround bundle. RulesFlavour.RosetteMechanic reads this lazily so spinner state never leaks match->match.

hub_image.description: Square PNG used as the hub face texture. The circular hub mesh clips it automatically.

outer_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the outer ring.

mid_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the middle ring (ring_count >= 3).

inner_image.description: Pre-rendered disc texture for the innermost ring (ring_count >= 2).

well_glass.description: Well glass-cap override: 'smoked' / 'none'. Empty/absent → derived from presentation.

arrow_image_scale.description: Quad side length in hub-radius units. Default 1.6.

arrow_image_below_disc.description: Draw arrow under the wedge face. Default false.

outer_image_rotation_rad.description: Static rotation applied to outer_image. Default 0.

well_radius_fraction.description: Default = centre-rose marking size. Casino uses 1.665.

surround_color.description: Hue+tone hex multiplied over the surround's grayscale grain (casino near-black). Absent = no tint.

corner_cap_color.description: Hue+tone hex multiplied over the corner-cap's grayscale grain (cafe brown). Absent = no tint.

grimeChannels.description: Per-channel grunge-map intensity multipliers (default 1.0; 0 = off) + patina tint range.

patina_min_color.description: Patina tint at low amount (light oxidation).

patina_max_color.description: Patina tint at high amount (heavy oxidation).

coinSet.description: Arcade leaves require white/black/queen/striker. icf/casual leaves treat the whole block as optional; missing fields fall back to IFlavour.DefaultCoins.

polish.description: Coin clearcoat polish amount. CoinSet.Polish; default 0.

pocket_rim_trim.description: Pocket rim trim: a hex colour (#RRGGBB paints a flat ring) OR a material id / texture path ("brass" / res://… seats a 3D metal rim).

board_edge_trim.description: Board edge trim: a material id / texture path ("brass" / res://… seats a 3D metal chamfer). The hex-colour form is unused for this key.

payoutPattern.description: Each entry is dispatched on 'type' to a PayoutPatternRegistry entry. Schema validates only the discriminator; per-pattern params are passed through.
